shared_properties: Keeps the front-facing cozy pet-room mood.
Reads cleanly at 1x scale with 1px pixel edges.
differences: This file is transparent outside the bars and top rim.
The room shell color fields stay outside this task.

reference_images.label: proxy_environment_spacing
reference_images.purpose: Proxy environment reference for bar spacing and top-rim framing.

reference_images.label: proxy_character_silhouette
reference_images.purpose: Proxy sprite reference for leaving the Echo body box readable behind the bars.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/pico_echo/trial_5/world_cage_foreground_bar_overlay.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under world_cage_foreground_bar_overlay.
runtime_notes: Render this overlay at a higher z value than Echo so the front bars sell cage depth.
Keep the lower floor area transparent so cleanup feedback remains visible.
Use integer translation values so the 1px bars do not flicker.

context.usage: Transparent front bars add cage depth while leaving Echo and UI readable.

shape.silhouette: 128x128 transparent overlay with seven 1px vertical bars, a 6px top rim, and open interior visibility.

acceptance_criteria: Overlay canvas is 128x128px with transparency outside the cage bars and top rim.
Seven 1px vertical bars extend from y=6 to y=109 and do not cover the full 40x40 Echo body box.
All opaque pixels use #C2C3C7 or #1D2B53 only.
Bottom floor area from y=110 to y=127 stays transparent so cleanup states remain visible.
